title: Projects
description: ICUBE-Q, SSS-2A, ICUBE-1, ICUBE-N, ICUBE-CSAT, KidSat. CubeSat and space systems leadership.

title: NGN/NTN–PPDR Simulator
description: Active simulator and digital-twin direction for resilient communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks (PPDR). Representative frontend preview on the public site; broader work includes scenario evaluation and KPI-driven analysis.

title: About
description: Director and PI, SSTRL; Associate Professor, IST. One of three Principal Investigators for ICUBE-Q. CubeSat programs, NGN/NTN–PPDR research, and technical program leadership.
